ddls:
CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein */,
  "accession_number" TEXT /* Accession number of the protein */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Gene symbol of the protein */,
  "protein_mw" INTEGER /* Molecular weight of the protein */,
  "percent_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of the protein sequence covered by identified peptides */,
  "group_num" INTEGER /* Group number of the protein */,
  "subgroup_num" INTEGER /* Subgroup number of the protein */,
  "score_unique" REAL /* Score for unique peptides */,
  "score_unique_subgroup_specific_ci" REAL /* Score for unique peptides with subgroup-specific confidence intervals */,
  "orf_category" TEXT /* Open reading frame category */,
  "sequence_length" INTEGER /* Length of the protein sequence */,
  "entry_name" TEXT /* Entry name of the protein */,
  "cellular_component" TEXT /* Cellular component where the protein is located */,
  "biological_process" TEXT /* Biological processes in which the protein is involved */,
  "molecular_function" TEXT /* Molecular functions of the protein */,
  "pcornc" TEXT /* PCorNC classification */,
  "es_score" TEXT /* ES score */,
  "signalp" TEXT /* SignalP prediction */,
  "tm" TEXT /* Transmembrane domain prediction */,
  "structure" TEXT /* 3D structure of the protein */,
  "function_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the protein's function */,
  "subcellular_localization" TEXT /* Subcellular location of the protein */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expression_data" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expression data entry */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the protein */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Experimental condition */,
  "r126127" REAL /* Expression value for R126127 */,
  "r126128" REAL /* Expression value for R126128 */,
  "r126131" REAL /* Expression value for R126131 */,
  "r129127" REAL /* Expression value for R129127 */,
  "r129128" REAL /* Expression value for R129128 */,
  "r129131" REAL /* Expression value for R129131 */,
  "r130127" REAL /* Expression value for R130127 */,
  "r130128" REAL /* Expression value for R130128 */,
  "r130131" REAL /* Expression value for R130131 */,
  "brain_searched_unique_peptides" INTEGER /* Number of unique peptides identified in the brain */,
  "brain_searched_num_spectra" INTEGER /* Number of spectra identified in the brain */,
  "brain_searched_total_intensity" REAL /* Total intensity of spectra identified in the brain */,
  "brain_searched_pct_cov" REAL /* Percentage coverage of the protein in the brain */,
  "adj_p_val_xbir_a_over_no_bir_a" REAL /* Adjusted p-value for expression change with treatment */,
  "ave_expr_xbir_a_over_no_bir_a" REAL /* Average expression level with treatment */,
  "log_p_value_xbir_a_over_no_bir_a" REAL /* Log p-value for expression change with treatment */,
  "log_fc_xbir_a_over_no_bir_a" REAL /* Log fold change in expression with treatment */,
  "p_value_xbir_a_over_no_bir_a" REAL /* p-value for expression change with treatment */,
  "t_xbir_a_over_no_bir_a" REAL /* t-score for expression change with treatment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the treatment */,
  "replicate" INTEGER /* Replicate of the experiment */,
  "expression_level" REAL /* Expression level of the protein */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expression_data_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expression_data_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expression_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expression_data_condition FOREIGN KEY ("condition") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the experimental condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experimental condition */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of the condition */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Affiliated institution of the user */,
  "lab" TEXT /* Laboratory of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the protein */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the protein data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user during access */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent information during access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the protein */,
  "go_term" TEXT /* Gene Ontology (GO) term */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the GO term */,
  "annotation_source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the protein */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the publication was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  "pmid" TEXT /* PMID of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "protein_id_1" INTEGER /* Reference to the first protein in the interaction */,
  "protein_id_2" INTEGER /* Reference to the second protein in the interaction */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of interaction */,
  "strength" REAL /* Strength of the interaction */,
  "interaction_detection_method" TEXT /* Method used to detect the interaction */,
  "interaction_confidence" REAL /* Confidence score for the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_protein_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id_1") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_protein_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id_2") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutations" (
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutation */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the protein */,
  "mutation_type" TEXT /* Type of mutation */,
  "amino_acid_change" TEXT /* Amino acid change caused by the mutation */,
  "functional_impact" TEXT /* Functional impact of the mutation */,
  "mutation_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the mutation in a population */,
  "mutation_consequence" TEXT /* Consequence of the mutation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutations_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experimental condition */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "dose" REAL /* Dose of the treatment */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the treatment */,
  "treatment_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "treatment_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication related to the dataset */,
  "dataset_submission_date" TEXT /* Submission date of the dataset */,
  "dataset_update_date" TEXT /* Last update date of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)
